name: @cfls/vscode-extension
description: VS Code Editor_Extension that talks only to the local CoordinationAgent: emits editor events, renders coordination state, and enforces hard-stop for cooperating edits.

commands.title: CFLS: Reconnect to Local Coordination Agent

cfls.localApi.url.description: Loopback WebSocket URL of the local CoordinationAgent Local_API. The extension never connects to the CoordinationHost directly.

cfls.localApi.token.description: Per-session Local_Auth_Token presented to the local CoordinationAgent Local_API.

cfls.heartbeat.intervalMs.description: Interval, in milliseconds, at which the extension sends heartbeats to the local CoordinationAgent.

scripts.package:vsix: pnpm run build:vsix && cd vsix-pkg && vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-missing-repository -o cfls-coordination.vsix
